title: Explain risk clearly
subtitle: Risk, likelihood, impact, response.
overview: Module: Professional and Academic Independence. B2 Hi develops high-B2 independence: layered argument, long-form speaking, deep native input, professional authority, precise style, complex topics, and C1 readiness.

sections.title: B2 hi focus
rows: Risk language helps people make decisions before problems happen.
风险语言帮助人们在问题发生前做决定。
B2 Hi frame: clarify purpose, adapt to audience, justify choices, and manage risk or uncertainty.
B2 Hi 框架：澄清目的、适应听众、说明选择理由，并管理风险或不确定性。
Explain one risk and one response.
解释一个风险和一个应对。
The main risk is that learners may skip output tasks if they feel too difficult. The impact would be slower speaking progress, so we should make the first tasks very short and highly guided.
主要风险是，如果输出任务感觉太难，学习者可能会跳过它们。影响会是口语进步变慢，所以我们应该让最初的任务非常短并且高度引导。

items.en: Risk language helps people make decisions before problems happen.
items.zh: 风险语言帮助人们在问题发生前做决定。

items.en: B2 Hi frame: clarify purpose, adapt to audience, justify choices, and manage risk or uncertainty.
items.zh: B2 Hi 框架：澄清目的、适应听众、说明选择理由，并管理风险或不确定性。

items.en: The main risk is that learners may skip output tasks if they feel too difficult. The impact would be slower speaking progress, so we should make the first tasks very short and highly guided.
items.zh: 主要风险是，如果输出任务感觉太难，学习者可能会跳过它们。影响会是口语进步变慢，所以我们应该让最初的任务非常短并且高度引导。

items.en: I will make the answer independent, not just correct.
items.zh: 我会让回答独立，而不只是正确。

items.en: A high B2 answer should show structure, judgment, tone control, and real examples.
items.zh: 高 B2 回答应该显示结构、判断力、语气控制和真实例子。

items.en: If my idea is complex, I will guide the listener with clear transitions.
items.zh: 如果我的想法复杂，我会用清楚转场引导听者。

items.en: I can revise for precision without making the language heavy.
items.zh: 我可以为了准确而修改，同时不让语言变沉重。

items.en: This lesson should help me speak and write with more authority and more humility.
items.zh: 这节课应该帮助我更有权威感也更谦逊地说和写。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Explain one risk and one response.
lines.zh: 解释一个风险和一个应对。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The main risk is that learners may skip output tasks if they feel too difficult. The impact would be slower speaking progress, so we should make the first tasks very short and highly guided.
lines.zh: 主要风险是，如果输出任务感觉太难，学习者可能会跳过它们。影响会是口语进步变慢，所以我们应该让最初的任务非常短并且高度引导。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the response more independent and better structured?
lines.zh: 你能让这个回应更独立、结构更好吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will define the issue, add depth, address a complication, and close with a practical implication.
lines.zh: 可以。我会定义问题、加入深度、处理复杂点，并用实际影响收尾。

items.en: Explain one risk and one response.
items.zh: 解释一个风险和一个应对。

items.en: Answer once in seven or eight sentences with clear transitions.
items.zh: 用七到八句话回答一次，并使用清楚转场。

items.en: Add one high-B2 move: define a term, answer an objection, or qualify the conclusion.
items.zh: 加入一个高 B2 动作：定义术语、回应反对意见或限定结论。

items.en: Record the answer and revise one sentence for precision and natural rhythm.
items.zh: 录下回答，并修改一句话，让它更准确、节奏更自然。

items.en: Keep the revised version as a model for future C1 Bridge practice.
items.zh: 把修改后的版本保留为未来 C1 Bridge 练习的模型。
